Question: Derive the equation for friction force on a block on an inclined plane and explain assumptions.
Answer Content: Step 1: free body diagram (1 mark) // Step 2: resolve forces along/perpendicular to incline (1 mark) // Step 3: write friction = mu * N (1 mark) // Step 4: substitute N = mg cos(theta) (1 mark) // Step 5: state assumption: rigid body, no air drag (1 mark)
Answer Explanation: Standard inclined-plane derivation; mark per labelled step.
